title: paspalum tectorium
intro: Paspalum tectorium, also known as thatching grass or Paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Paspalum tectorium include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum tectorium include its ability to help manage digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Paspalum tectorium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
